    E

    EDIT - Statische Variable in Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.utils.UnicodeSymbols
     
    EditOrderGUI - Klasse in ch.framedev.lagersystem.guis
    Modern edit order GUI with improved visual design and user experience.
    EditOrderGUI(Order) - Konstruktor für Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.guis.EditOrderGUI
    Initializes the EditOrderGUI with the given order, setting up the layout, components, and event handlers for editing the order details and articles.

    ENABLE_AUTO_STOCK_CHECK - Enum-Konstante in Enum-Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.guis.SettingsGUI.Variable
    Ob die automatische Lagerbestandsprüfung aktiviert ist.
    ENABLE_AUTOMATIC_IMPORT_QRCODE - Enum-Konstante in Enum-Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.guis.SettingsGUI.Variable
    Ob die automatische Anzeige von ungelesenen Warnungen aktiviert ist.
    ENABLE_WARNING_INTERVAL - Enum-Konstante in Enum-Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.guis.SettingsGUI.Variable
    Ob die automatische Anzeige von ungelesenen Warnungen aktiviert ist.

    exists(String) - Methode in Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.managers.NotesManager
    Checks if a note with the given title exists in the database.
    existsArticle(String) - Methode in Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.managers.ArticleManager
    Check if an article exists by its article number
    existsClient(String) - Methode in Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.managers.ClientManager
    Checks if a client with the given name exists in the database.
    existsDepartment(String) - Methode in Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.managers.DepartmentManager
    Checks if a department with the given name exists.

    exportArticlesToCsv(List) - Statische Methode in Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.utils.ArticleExporter
    Exports the given list of articles to a CSV file, prompting the user for the save location.
    exportArticlesToPdf(List) - Statische Methode in Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.utils.ArticleExporter
    Exports the given list of articles to a PDF file, prompting the user for the save location.
    exportLogsToPdf(List, JFrame) - Statische Methode in Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.utils.ArticleExporter
    Exports the given list of log entries to a PDF file, prompting the user for the save location.
    exportOrderToPDF(File, JComboBox, JTextField, JComboBox, JTextField, JComboBox, Map) - Statische Methode in Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.utils.ArticleExporter
    Generates a PDF file representing an order, including sender and receiver information, department, and a list of ordered articles with their quantities and prices.
    exportTableAsPdf(Component, JTable, int[], Icon) - Statische Methode in Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.utils.ArticleExporter
    Exports the contents of a JTable to a PDF file, allowing the user to choose the save location and file name.
